steps.t: Kyrstig, the last of Ausma's scouts, can be found further up the Father's Path. You should find Kyrstig with Hórin.
You have found Kyrstig near Ibdêkh-buzru, the Thing-fold. You should talk to Kyrstig.
Hórin can be found near Ibdêkh-buzru, the Thing-fold. You should talk to Hórin.
Kyrstig mentioned a dwarf-fort called Bagud-dum which seems to be the Angmarim's main base of operations in the Welkin-lofts. You should find Bagud-du…
